response.justification: Candidate has 15+ years of solid full-stack engineering experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and cloud-adjacent work, plus recent exposure to MCP code generators and agentic workflows at re:cinq. However, the resume lacks explicit evidence of 8+ years building production GenAI systems, vector databases, RAG architectures, or multi-agent frameworks like LangGraph/CrewAI. Strong engineering foundation and customer-facing potential warrant a conversation, but the core GenAI depth required for a Staff Forward Deployed role is unclear.
strengths: Deep polyglot engineering background (TS/Node, Python-adjacent, D, Java) with 15+ years shipping production systems
Recent hands-on work with MCP servers and agentic workflow tooling at re:cinq
Demonstrated technical leadership via workshops, talks, and founding GISCollective — transferable to customer-facing discovery
concerns: No explicit evidence of 8+ years building GenAI/LLM production systems — AI exposure appears recent and limited
Missing demonstrated experience with vector databases, RAG architectures, and LLM evaluation/observability pipelines
Cloud platform experience is light (AWS CDK mentioned once); no clear GCP/Azure or large-scale AI infrastructure delivery

key_factors.factor: Senior full-stack and leadership track record
